items.custom_prompt: Mention the Street Address of the applicant.
Mention the email address of the primary contact person of the applicant.
Mention the City, State, Postal Code, Country of the applicant.

Specify the type of evaluation being conducted. Choose one: 'ETL Listing' for North American certification, 'CB' for international CB scheme certification, or specify another evaluation type (e.g., 'Field Evaluation', 'Special Inspection')

items.question: Enter the full name of the primary contact person at the applicant/client company (e.g., 'John Smith' or 'Sarah Johnson')
items.custom_prompt: Mention the name of primary contact person of the applicant.

Enter the complete standard reference(s) used for this evaluation including title, number, edition, and date. Format: 'Standard Number: Standard Title, Edition/Date' (e.g., 'UL 508A: Industrial Control Panels, 3rd Edition 2013' or 'IEC 60950-1: Information Technology Equipment - Safety, 2nd Edition 2005'). If multiple standards, list each on a new line

Specify which stage(s) of the evaluation process identified the non-conformances. Choose: 'during our evaluation (Stage 1)', 'during our testing (Stage 2)', or 'during our evaluation (Stage 1) and testing (Stage 2)'

Specify the type of deliverable document that will be provided. Choose: 'CB Test Report' for CB scheme, 'ETL CDR' (Construction Details Report) for ETL listing, or specify another deliverable type (e.g., 'Field Evaluation Report', 'Technical Assessment')

items.key: <will be sent under separate cover/attached to this letter>
items.value: <will be sent under separate cover/attached to this letter>
items.custom_prompt: Specify how the draft deliverable will be provided. Choose: 'will be sent under separate cover' if sending separately, or 'attached to this letter' if including with this letter report

Specify what is being evaluated. Choose the most appropriate: 'product' for a single item, 'products' for multiple items, 'system' for an integrated system, or specify another appropriate term (e.g., 'equipment', 'assembly', 'installation')

Specify what type of samples or documentation are needed. Choose: 'additional' if new samples/documents are required, 'modified' if changes to existing samples/documents are needed, or 'additional/modified' if both may apply

items.key: the intrinsic safety analysis and constructional evaluation
items.value: the intrinsic safety analysis and constructional evaluation

items.custom_prompt: Specify when the non-conformances were identified. If found during initial documentation review, keep as 'Initial Documentation Review'. If found during another phase, replace with the appropriate phase name (e.g., 'Physical Inspection', 'Performance Testing', 'Final Evaluation')

Extract the project number from the document. This is typically found in the header or introductory section and follows a format like 'Project No. XXXXX'

Determine if repeat testing is required based on the evaluation results. Fill with 'and conduct repeat testing, if required' if testing issues were identified, otherwise leave blank
Select 'will' if modified samples or additional documentation WILL be required for follow-up project based on the non-conformances identified

items.question: Completed By

items.question: What is the name of the reviewer?
items.custom_prompt: Extract the name of the person who reviewed this evaluation report. Look for reviewer information in signature sections or document metadata
